summary: Conflict Detection feature fully tested. Backend: 10/10 tests pass. Frontend: All UI elements working correctly - conflict alert (red), warning alert (amber), available badge (green), suggestion chips, 'Trouver le meilleur créneau' button, transparency note, V2 teaser, confidence indicator.

backend: Returns 'conflict' status when proposed slot overlaps existing engagement
Returns 'warning' status when proposed slot is within 30min of existing engagement
Returns 'available' with 'medium' confidence when no conflicts
Suggestions array contains datetime_str and label (optimal/comfortable/tight)
Uses default duration of 60 minutes if not specified
Response contains all required fields (status, confidence, conflicts, warnings, suggestions)
frontend: Conflict panel appears when date/time is filled
Red conflict alert displayed with engagement title 'Test Source Trust' and time range (08:00-09:00)
Amber warning alert displayed when slot is within 30min buffer ('Risque de retard')
Green 'Créneau libre' badge displayed when available
5 suggestion chips displayed with labels (serré, confort, optimal)
Suggestion chips are clickable and pre-fill the date/time input
'Trouver le meilleur créneau' button works and selects optimal slot
Transparency note 'vérifié uniquement sur vos engagements NLYT' is visible
V2 teaser 'Google Calendar / Outlook : bientôt' is visible

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data ('Test Source Trust' appointment at 2026-06-20T08:00:00Z, 60min)
